h1.visual_description: Large, bold, dark blue sans-serif font, serving as the primary slide title.
h1.example_text: Base Model Performance Evaluation of Upstage OCR Pack

h2.visual_description: Medium, light purple sans-serif font, positioned at the top left as a section or category header.

h3.visual_description: Medium-weight, dark grey sans-serif font, used for specific chart or sub-section titles.
h3.example_text: Upstage universal OCR model E2E performance evaluation¹

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Footnote reference markers linking body text to bottom-of-page explanations.

visual_matchers.pattern: small, blue-colored text blocks at the bottom
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Footnote definitions, technical caveats, and source citations.

visual_matchers.pattern: Upstage | logo in bottom right corner
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Corporate branding and page footer element.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Standard LaTeX ($...$ for inline, $$...$$ for block)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric superscript citations corresponding to a numbered list at the bottom of the page.

layout_info.primary_flow: multi-column (two-column layout for visual data and charts)
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top-left section labels, bottom-right corporate logos, and centered page numbers (e.g., '11') should be treated as layout metadata/noise.
